name: Strait Innovation Internet Co., Ltd.
summary: Strait Innovation Internet Co., Ltd. engages in the design, consultation, and implementation of intelligent and information system integration projects in China. The company's activities include analysis of the overall framework of smart cities; smart city research planning and project consulting; smart city platform construction and development implementation; smart city service outsourcing and operation and maintenance; smart city integrated services; smart city overall contract; and internet financial ecosystem. It also provides smart medical services, such as remote consultation, medical technology, medical management, medical investment, medical insurance, and chronic disease management services; and engages in the strategic investment activities. The company was formerly known as Hakim Unique Internet Co., Ltd. Strait Innovation Internet Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Hangzhou, China.
